scenarios.description: children() on element with no child nodes returns empty Elements (childNodeSize==0)
scenarios.precondition: Element el = new Element("div"); // no children

scenarios.description: children() on element with one Element child returns list of size 1 (loop-1)
scenarios.precondition: Element parent = new Element("ul"); parent.appendChild(new Element("li"));
scenarios.expectedResult: returned Elements contains exactly the one appended Element

scenarios.description: children() filters out non-Element nodes, returning only Element children (mixed nodes)
scenarios.precondition: Element parent = new Element("p"); parent.appendChild(new TextNode("text")); parent.appendChild(new Element("span")); parent.appendChild(new DataNode("data")); parent.appendChild(new Element("em"));
scenarios.expectedResult: returned Elements contains only the two Element children (span, em) in order

scenarios.description: children() returns snapshot so later appendChild updates new children list (cache invalidated)
scenarios.precondition: Element parent = new Element("div"); parent.appendChild(new Element("a"));
scenarios.expectedResult: first children.size()==1; after appendChild(second), new children.size()==2
